title: RobertoReale/chrono-cataloger
summary: Turns your Chrome browsing history into an automatic personal diary: a record, organized by the categories you define, of what you have studied, discovered and explored over time. More generally, it is a tool for analyzing your own history according to categories and prompts you choose freely.

title: Daksh-Aneja-Projects/KAEOS
summary: Open-source company brain where AI agents earn autonomy. Compliance, fairness, HITL and debate gates over a tenant-isolated org graph with Postgres RLS. Runs fully local on Ollama. Apache 2.0.

title: xxFOLDxx/boot.init
summary: Linux boot automation workspace with systemd services, desktop autostart, shell scripts, cron jobs, init scripts, and config samples to start apps at boot 🐙.

title: loblawbob873-svg/posterchanai
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant & bot platform — streaming chat with local or cloud LLMs (Ollama/llama.cpp/IPEX-LLM for Intel Arc), image generation, TTS/STT, RAG + MCP, and autonomous Telegram, Matrix, Misskey & Pleroma bots. FastAPI +   SQLite, single-admin multi-user.

title: raydeStar/sir-thaddeus
summary: Private, local-first AI assistant for Windows with permissioned tools, durable memory, and evidence-driven small-model improvements.

title: NimaHamedIman/VoxBridge
summary: A Voice-first AI assistant and human-centered interaction

title: pd95/local-agent-container
summary: Local agent container on your Mac

title: hidetheweed11/n8n_ExecutiveBot_Platform
summary: Amin's Smart Telegram Bot integrates Docker, Ollama, and Gemini AI for seamless communication. Enhance your Telegram experience with advanced AI capabilities. 🤖🌟

title: siddsachar/row-bot
summary: Row-Bot - Personal AI Sovereignty. A local-first AI assistant with integrated tools, a personal knowledge graph, voice, vision, shell, browser automation, scheduled tasks, health tracking, and messaging channels. Run locally via Ollama or add opt-in cloud models. Your data stays on your machine.

title: Kakz/prometheus-llm
summary: PrometheusLLM is a unique transformer architecture inspired by dignity and recursion. This project aims to explore new frontiers in AI research and welcomes contributions from the community. 🐙🌟

title: pavanbadempet/AI-Healthcare-System
summary: AI Data Engineering Healthcare Platform: PySpark Medallion Lakehouse, Airflow DAGs, 5 ML Models, Local LLM RAG, and FastAPI Clinical Architecture.

title: bielz09/Enhanced-HIBP-Checker
summary: Python application that uses local Ollama LLM models to give advice on results found from HIBP (Have I Been Pwned) API

title: ot4ank/auto-openwebui
summary: A bash script to automate running Open WebUI on Linux systems with Ollama and Cloudflare via Docker

title: voidstackloop/modelforge
summary: Desktop AI chat app unifying local Ollama models with OpenAI and Claude — includes an agentic mode where the model can read/write files and run shell commands, with every action requiring your approval.

title: sreekarnv/draftlet
summary: Local-first drafting assistant with a browser extension, desktop companion, and Ollama-powered local replies.

title: xtremecool/ollama-metrics-proxy
summary: A transparent proxy to allow cost comparisons between locally run LLMs and the higher costs cloud hosted models

title: mnimtz/printix-tonerwatch
summary: Multi-tenant Printix BI toner monitor + ordering console for MSPs. Autonomous ordering with AI SKU suggestions (OpenAI/Azure/Gemini/Anthropic/Ollama) + daily cap. Alerts via Resend/SMTP/Graph. Entra SSO auto-setup, Azure SQL/SQLite, Azure Blob backup, M365 Copilot indexing. Kanban, saved views, activity feed. EFIGS i18n.

title: LucidPrinciples/lucid-cove
summary: A private, self-hosted home for your family and its intelligence. Named agents with memory and daily practice — your data, your models, your machine.

title: karinanapoli/pm-os
summary: Open source AI Product Engineering platform for Product Managers.

title: alphonse-terrier/reword
summary: Select text anywhere on your Mac, hit a shortcut, and let your AI of choice rewrite it in place — no clipboard hassle, no app switching.
